G2274.strongs_def: to make worse, i.e. vanquish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to rate lower

G2258.kjv_def: + agree, be, X have (+ charge of), hold, use, was(-t), were

G2256.derivation: from the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G5610 (ὥρα);

G2226.derivation: neuter of a derivative of G2198 (ζάω);
G2226.strongs_def: a live thing, i.e. an animal

G2264.strongs_def: heroic; Herod, the name of four Jewish kings

G2224.strongs_def: to bind about (especially with a belt)

G2287.derivation: from (the feminine form of) G2288 (θάνατος) and G5342 (φέρω);

G2271.strongs_def: (as noun) stillness, i.e. desistance from bustle or language

G2263.derivation: perhaps by transposition from G2048 (ἔρημος) (through the idea of stillness);

G2276.derivation: neuter of comparative of (slightly) used for that of G2556 (κακός);
G2276.strongs_def: worse (as noun); by implication, less (as adverb)

G2210.strongs_def: to injure, i.e. (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment
G2210.kjv_def: be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss

G2212.strongs_def: to seek (literally or figuratively); specially, (by Hebraism) to worship (God), or (in a bad sense) to plot (against life)
G2212.kjv_def: be (go) about, desire, endeavour, enquire (for), require, (X will) seek (after, for, means)

G2272.derivation: a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος) and perhaps G2192 (ἔχω);
G2272.strongs_def: properly, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing)

G2205.strongs_def: properly, heat, i.e. (figuratively) "zeal" (in a favorable sense, ardor; in an unfavorable one, jealousy, as of a husband (figuratively, of God), or an enemy, malice)
G2205.kjv_def: emulation, envy(-ing), fervent mind, indignation, jealousy, zeal
G2205.usage: zeal(6x), envying(5x), indignation(2x), envy(1x), jealousy(1x), emulation(1x)

G2255.derivation: neuter of a derivative from an inseparable prefix akin to G260 (ἅμα) (through the idea of partition involved in connection) and meaning semi-;

G2260.strongs_def: than at all (or than perhaps, than indeed)

G2223.derivation: probably akin to the base of G2218 (ζυγός);
G2223.strongs_def: a belt; by implication, a pocket

G2245.derivation: from (a comrade, i.e. one of the same age);
G2245.strongs_def: as big as, i.e. (interjectively) how much

G2278.strongs_def: to make a loud noise, i.e. reverberate

G2214.strongs_def: a searching (properly, the act), i.e. a dispute or its theme

G2295.derivation: apparently from a form of G2300 (θεάομαι);
G2295.strongs_def: wonder (properly concrete; but by implication, abstract)

G2292.kjv_def: be bold, X boldly, have confidence, be confident

G2270.strongs_def: to keep still (intransitively), i.e. refrain from labor, meddlesomeness or speech
G2270.kjv_def: cease, hold peace, be quiet, rest

G2275.strongs_def: a deterioration, i.e. (objectively) failure or (subjectively) loss

G2291.strongs_def: Thara (i.e. Terach), the father of Abraham

G2213.strongs_def: a search (properly concretely), i.e. (in words) a debate

G2218.derivation: from the root of (to join, especially by a "yoke");
G2218.strongs_def: a coupling, i.e. (figuratively) servitude (a law or obligation); also (literally) the beam of the balance (as connecting the scales)

G2277.derivation: third person singular imperative of G1510 (εἰμί);

G2241.derivation: of Hebrew origin (H0410 with pronominal suffix);

G2290.strongs_def: to celebrate funeral rites, i.e. inter

G2253.derivation: from a presumed compound of the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G2348 (θνήσκω);

G2209.derivation: probably akin to the base of G1150 (δαμάζω) (through the idea of violence);

G2208.strongs_def: a Zealot, i.e. (specially) partisan for Jewish political independence

G2266.strongs_def: Herodias, a woman of the Heodian family

G2288.strongs_def: (properly, an adjective used as a noun) death (literally or figuratively)

G2229.derivation: an adverb of confirmation; perhaps intensive of G2228 (ἤ); used only (in the New Testament) before G3303 (μέν);

G2206.strongs_def: to have warmth of feeling for or against
G2206.kjv_def: affect, covet (earnestly), (have) desire, (move with) envy, be jealous over, (be) zealous(-ly affect)

G2203.strongs_def: in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a (probably cognate) name , which is otherwise obsolete; Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks

G2296.strongs_def: to wonder; by implication, to admire
G2296.kjv_def: admire, have in admiration, marvel, wonder

G2225.derivation: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and a derivative of G1096 (γίνομαι);
G2225.strongs_def: to engender alive, i.e. (by analogy) to rescue (passively, be saved) from death

G2261.strongs_def: properly, affable, i.e. mild or kind

G2228.derivation: a primary particle of distinction between two connected terms;
G2228.kjv_def: and, but (either), (n-)either, except it be, (n-)or (else), rather, save, than, that, what, yea

G2297.strongs_def: wondrous, i.e. (neuter as noun) a miracle

G2289.derivation: from G2288 (θάνατος) to kill (literally or figuratively)
G2289.kjv_def: become dead, (cause to be) put to death, kill, mortify

G2227.derivation: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G4160 (ποιέω);

G2234.derivation: adverb from a derivative of the base of G2237 (ἡδονή);

G2235.derivation: apparently from G2228 (ἤ) (or possibly G2229 (ἦ)) and G1211 (δή);

G2236.derivation: neuter plural of the superlative of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως);

G2232.strongs_def: a leader, i.e. chief person (or figuratively, place) of a province

G2202.derivation: feminine of a derivative (at the second stage) from the same as G2218 (ζυγός);

G2217.derivation: akin to the base of G3509 (νέφος);

G2201.strongs_def: a couple, i.e. a team (of oxen yoked together) or brace (of birds tied together)

G2246.strongs_def: perhaps akin to the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι)); the sun; by implication, light

G2204.strongs_def: to be hot (boil, of liquids; or glow, of solids), i.e. (figuratively) be fervid (earnest)

G2250.derivation: feminine (with G5610 (ὥρα) implied) of a derivative of (to sit; akin to the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος)) meaning tame, i.e. gentle;
G2250.strongs_def: day, i.e. (literally) the time space between dawn and dark, or the whole 24 hours (but several days were usually reckoned by the Jews as inclusive of the parts of both extremes); figuratively, a period (always defined more or less clearly by the context)
G2250.kjv_def: age, + alway, (mid-)day (by day, (-ly)), + for ever, judgment, (day) time, while, years

G2233.derivation: middle voice of a (presumed) strengthened form of G71 (ἄγω);
G2233.strongs_def: to lead, i.e. command (with official authority); figuratively, to deem, i.e. consider
G2233.kjv_def: account, (be) chief, count, esteem, governor, judge, have the rule over, suppose, think

G2221.derivation: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G64 (ἀγρεύω);
G2221.strongs_def: to take alive (make a prisoner of war), i.e. (figuratively) to capture or ensnare

G2240.strongs_def: to arrive, i.e. be present (literally or figuratively)

G2279.strongs_def: a loud or confused noise ("echo"), i.e. roar; figuratively, a rumor

G2265.derivation: plural of a derivative of G2264 (Ἡρώδης);

G2238.derivation: neuter of the compound of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως) and G3744 (ὀσμή);

G2211.derivation: probably contracted from a poetic form of G2203 (Ζεύς) and G1435 (δῶρον);
